_doc: Controlled vocabulary for src/lib/formulas.json typography, enforced by tests/unit/formula-typography.test.ts against ISO 80000-2 / NIST. Every token that appears inside \text{}/\mathrm{} in a formula MUST be registered here (catches typos + forces a deliberate decision for each new symbol). Classes: names = multi-letter quantity names/acronyms (upright); operators = function names written as text (upright); labels = descriptive subscript words (upright); variables = the ONLY single letters allowed bare/italic; constants = must be upright if used (e, i); units = currencies/units (upright).
